title.ko: 그 밖에 분류되지 않는 응용되는 물질； 그 밖에 분류되지 않는 물질의 응용
title.en: MATERIALS FOR APPLICATIONS NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR; APPLICATIONS OF MATERIALS NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR

definition.ko: (1) 이 서브클래스는 특정 물질의 사용뿐만 아니라, 다른 경우에 특별히 분류되지 않는 응용으로서의 사용도 포함한다. (2) 이 서브클래스에서, 다음의 용어는 이하에 표시하는 의미로 사용한다. - "물질"은 조성물을 포함한다.

title.ko: 달리 분류되지 않는 재료

title.en: for sealing or packing joints or covers
for stopping leaks, e.g. in radiators or in tanks
for application to surface to minimize adherence of ice, mist or water thereto; Thawing or antifreeze materials for application to surfaces
as substitutes for glycerol in its non-chemical uses, e.g. as a base in toiletry creams or ointments

title.ko: 액체 오염물 처리용, 예. 기름, 가솔린 또는 지방(유해 화학물질 내부의 화학적 변화에 의해 유해한 화학 물질을 무해하게 하거나 덜 유해하게 하는 방법 A62D 3/00)
title.en: for treating liquid pollutants, e.g. oil, gasoline or fat (processes for making harmful chemical substances harmless or less harmful, by effecting a chemical change in the substances A62D0003000000)

title.ko: 열 전달 물질, 열 교환 물질 또는 축열 (heat- storage)물질, 예. 냉매; 연소 이외의 화학 반응에 의하여 열 또는 한랭을 발생하는 물질
title.en: Heat-transfer, heat-exchange or heat-storage materials, e.g. refrigerants; Materials for the production of heat or cold by chemical reactions other than by combustion

title.ko: 사용될 때 물리적 상태 변화를 진행하는 물질(C09K 5/16, C09K 5/20 이 우선)
title.en: Materials undergoing a change of physical state when used (C09K0005160000, C09K0005200000 take precedence)
the change of state being from liquid to vapour or vice-versa
the change of state being from liquid to solid or vice-versa

title.ko: 사용될 때 물리적 상태 변화를 진행하지 않는 물질(C09K 5/16, C09K 5/20 이 우선)
title.en: Materials not undergoing a change of physical state when used (C09K0005160000, C09K0005200000 take precedence)
Molten materials, i.e. materials solid at room temperature, e.g. metals or salts
Solid materials, e.g. powdery or granular
Materials undergoing chemical reactions when used
Antifreeze additives therefor, e.g. for radiator liquids

title.ko: 착정 또는 갱정용 조성물； 착정 또는 유전을 처리하기 위한 조성물, 예.완성 작업 또는 수선 작업용의 것
title.en: Compositions for drilling of boreholes or wells; Compositions for treating boreholes or wells, e.g. for completion or for remedial operations

title.ko: 착정용 조성물

definition.ko: 그룹 C09K8/03 ~ C09K8/38에서, 최후개소 우선 규칙이 적용됩니다. 즉. 각 계층 레벨에서 반대의 표시가 없는 경우 마지막 적절한 개소에 분류됩니다.

title.en: Specific additives for general use in well-drilling compositions

title.ko: 수성 착정용 조성물

title.en: containing inorganic compounds only, e.g. mixtures of clay and salt

title.ko: 점토를 함유 하지 않는 화합물(무기 화합물만을 함유 하는 것8/05)
title.en: Clay-free compositions (containing inorganic compounds only C09K0008050000)
containing natural organic compounds, e.g. polysaccharides, or derivatives thereof
containing synthetic organic macromolecular compounds or their precursors

title.ko: 점토를 함유하는 화합물(무기 화합물만을 함유하는 것 C09K 8/05)
title.en: Clay-containing compositions (containing inorganic compounds only C09K0008050000)
characterised by the inorganic compounds other than clay
Natural organic compounds or derivatives thereof, e.g. polysaccharides or lignin derivatives
Spacer compositions, e.g. compositions used to separate well-drilling from cementing masses

title.ko: 시멘트용 조성물, 예. 시추공에 케이싱을 시멘팅하기 위한 것; 막아버리기 위한 조성물, 예. 우물을 묻기 위한 것(시추공 벽에 미장 공사를 하기 위한 조성물 C09K 8/50)
title.en: Compositions for cementing, e.g. for cementing casings into boreholes; Compositions for plugging, e.g. for killing wells (compositions for plastering borehole walls C09K0008500000)
containing inorganic binders, e.g. Portland cement
Density reducing additives, e.g. for obtaining foamed cement compositions
Fluid loss control additives; Additives for reducing or preventing circulation loss
Additives for reducing or preventing gas migration

title.ko: 시추공벽을 바르기 위한 조성물, 즉, 시추공벽의 일시적 강화를 위한 조성물
title.en: Compositions for plastering borehole walls, i.e. compositions for temporary consolidation of borehole walls

title.ko: 물 혹은 극성 용제계의 조성물(C09K 8/502가 우선)
title.en: Compositions based on water or polar solvents (C09K0008502000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 유기 화합물을 함유하는 것
고분자 화합물을 함유하는 것
천연 유래의 것, 예. 다당류, 셀룰로오스(C09K 8/512가 우선)
title.en: of natural origin, e.g. polysaccharides, cellulose (C09K0008512000 takes precedence)
characterised by their form or by the form of their components, e.g. encapsulated material
Compositions for preventing, limiting or eliminating depositions, e.g. for cleaning
organic depositions, e.g. paraffins or asphaltenes
inorganic depositions, e.g. sulfates or carbonates
characterised by their form or by the form of their components, e.g. encapsulated material
Compositions for in situ inhibition of corrosion in boreholes or wells

title.ko: 그 침투성을 과도하게 저하시키는 일 없이, 유전 주위의 느슨한 모래 또는 그 유사물을 강화하기 위한 조성물
title.en: Compositions for consolidating loose sand or the like around wells without excessively decreasing the permeability thereof

title.ko: 물 또는 극성 용제계의 조성물(8/565가 우선)
title.en: Compositions based on water or polar solvents (C09K0008565000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 탄화수소를 채취하기 위한 강화 회수법을 위한 조성물, 즉, 기름의 유동성을 높이기 위한, 예.유체의 송출, 조성물
title.en: Compositions for enhanced recovery methods for obtaining hydrocarbons, i.e. for improving the mobility of the oil, e.g. displacing fluids
characterised by the use of bacteria
characterised by the use of specific surfactants
characterised by the use of specific polymers
Compositions used in combination with generated heat, e.g. by steam injection

title.ko: 분사된 기체와 조합하여 사용하는 조성물(C09K 8/592가 우선)
title.en: Compositions used in combination with injected gas (C09K0008592000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 지하 형태에서 행하기 위해 생산을 자극하기 위한 조성물
title.en: Compositions for stimulating production by acting on the underground formation

title.ko: 갈라진 곳 또는 균열을 형성하기 위한 조성물
title.en: Compositions for forming crevices or fractures

title.ko: 물 또는 극성 용제계의 조성물(C09K 8/64가 우선)
title.en: Compositions based on water or polar solvents (C09K0008640000 takes precedence)
characterised by their form or by the form of their components, e.g. foams
combined with additives added for specific purposes
for preventing or reducing fluid loss
Compositions for reinforcing fractures, e.g. compositions of proppants used to keep the fractures open

title.ko: 오일 베이스계의 조성물(C09K 8/64가 우선)
물 또는 극성 용제계의 조성물(C09K 8/66, C09K 8/82가 우선)
title.en: Compositions based on water or polar solvents (C09K0008660000, C09K0008820000 take precedence)
of natural origin, e.g. polysaccharides, cellulose

title.ko: 그 형상 또는 그 성분의 형상에 특징이 있는 것, 예.피포성 물질(C09K 8/70가 우선)
title.en: characterised by their form or by the form of their components, e.g. encapsulated material (C09K0008700000 takes precedence)
Tenebrescent materials, i.e. materials for which the range of wavelengths for energy absorption is changed as a result of excitation by some form of energy
Luminescent materials, e.g. electroluminescent or chemiluminescent
Use of particular materials as binders, particle coatings or suspension media therefor
containing natural or artificial radioactive elements or unspecified radioactive elements
having chemically-interreactive components, e.g. reactive chemiluminescent compositions
containing beryllium, magnesium, alkali metals or alkaline earth metals
containing fluorine, chlorine, bromine, iodine or unspecified halogen elements
also containing phosphorus and halogen, e.g. halophosphates
containing oxygen and halogen, e.g. oxyhalides
containing selenium, tellurium or unspecified chalcogen elements
containing heavy metal salts in an amount of at least 50% of the non-solvent components
Anti-oxidant compositions; Compositions inhibiting chemical change
containing a phenol or quinone moiety
containing a phenol or quinone moiety
containing an amine or imine moiety
containing an amide or imide moiety
containing a phenol or quinone moiety
containing heterocyclic ring with at least one nitrogen atom as ring member
containing boron, silicon, phosphorus, selenium, tellurium or a metal
containing plant or animal materials of unknown composition
applied in a physical form other than a solution or a grout, e.g. as granules or gases
applied in a physical form other than a solution or a grout, e.g. as platelets or granules
Condensation polymers of aldehydes or ketones
of natural origin, e.g. cellulosic materials
Compounds having one or more carbon-to-silicon linkages
containing mixtures of inorganic and organic compounds
Inorganic compounds mixed with organic active ingredients, e.g. accelerators
the inorganic compound being a water-soluble silicate
Organic compounds mixed with inorganic active ingredients, e.g. polymerisation catalysts
the organic compound being of natural origin, e.g. cellulose derivatives

title.ko: 액정 물질

definition.ko: 그룹 C09K19/02 ~ C09K19/52에서, 최후개소 우선 규칙이 적용됩니다. 즉. 각 계층 레벨에서 반대의 표시가 없는 경우 물질은 마지막 적절한 개소에 분류됩니다.

title.en: characterised by optical, electrical or physical properties of the components, in general

title.ko: 액정 성분의 화학적 구조에 의하여 특징지어지는 것
title.en: characterised by the chemical structure of the liquid crystal components
containing at least two non-condensed rings
containing at least two benzene rings
at least two benzene rings directly linked, e.g. biphenyls
the chain containing carbon-to-carbon double bonds, e.g. stilbenes
the chain containing carbon-to-carbon triple bonds, e.g. tolans
linked by a chain containing carbon and oxygen atoms as chain links, e.g. esters
linked by a chain containing carbon and nitrogen atoms as chain links, e.g. Schiff bases
linked by a chain containing nitrogen-to-nitrogen bonds
linked by a chain containing carbon and sulfur atoms as chain links, e.g. thioesters
containing saturated or unsaturated non-aromatic rings, e.g. cyclohexane rings
containing condensed ring systems, i.e. fused, bridged or spiro ring systems
containing at least one heterocyclic ring
containing elements other than carbon, hydrogen, halogen, oxygen, nitrogen or sulfur, e.g. silicon, metals

title.ko: 전기 그룹 C09K 19/06부터 C09K 19/40의 2이상에 분류된 복수 액정 화합물의 혼합물
title.en: Mixtures of liquid crystal compounds covered by two or more of the preceding groups C09K0019060000-C09K0019400000

definition.ko: 1.이 그룹은 그 그룹에서만 분류되는 그룹 C09K19/04 ~ C09K19/40과 동일한 그룹으로 개별적으로 다루는 둘 이상의 액정 화합물을 함유하는 혼합물을 포함하지 않는다. 2.이 그룹에 속하는 혼합물의 액정 성분이 관심 대상인 경우, 이들은 또한 C09K19/04 ~ C09K19/40 그룹의 화합물에 따라 분류된다.

title.en: containing compounds with benzene rings directly linked
characterised by components which are not liquid crystals, e.g. additives

title.ko: 유화제, 습윤제, 분산제 또는 거품 발생제로서 물질의 사용
title.en: Use of substances as emulsifying, wetting, dispersing, or foam-producing agents
Alkyl sulfonates or sulfuric acid ester salts derived from monohydric alcohols

title.ko: 다가 알코올 또는 아미노 알코올 또는 이들의 유도체로부터 유도된 술폰산염 또는 황산 에스테르 염(황화 또는 술폰화 지방유 C09K23/08)
title.en: Sulfonates or sulfuric acid ester salts derived from polyhydric alcohols or amino alcohols or derivatives thereof (sulfated or sulfonated fatty oils C09K0023080000)
Esters of higher fatty acids with hydroxyalkylated sulfonic acids or salts thereof
Sulfation or sulfonation products of fats, oils, waxes, or higher fatty acids or esters thereof with monovalent alcohols
Derivatives of low-molecular-weight sulfocarboxylic acids or sulfopolycarboxylic acids
Sulfonates of aromatic or alkylated aromatic compounds
Amides of higher fatty acids with aminoalkylated sulfonic acids

title.ko: 아미노카르복실산(단백질 및 단백질 가수분해물 C09K23/30)
title.en: Aminocarboxylic acids (proteins and protein hydrolysates C09K0023300000)

title.ko: 고분자량 카르복실산 에스테르 (고급 지방산과 하이드록시 알킬화 설폰산의 에스테르 또는 이의 염 C09K23/06)
title.en: Higher-molecular-weight carboxylic acid esters (esters of higher fatty acids with hydroxyalkylated sulfonic acids or salts thereof C09K0023060000)
Alcohols, e.g. oxidation products of paraffins
Ethers, e.g. polyglycol ethers of alcohols or phenols
Natural or synthetic resins or their salts
Indexing scheme associated with group C09K0017000000, relating to the use or the intended effect of the soil-conditioning or soil-stabilising materials.
Indexing scheme associated with group C09K0011000000, relating to the luminescent materials
